zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Drury於1500年5月30日出生在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德時，他的父親Sir Robert Drury46歲，母親Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury40歲。他於1516年2月7日與Joan St Maur在英國英格蘭結婚。他去世於1558年1月11日在英國素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年57歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可霍斯亞德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Drury于1500年5月30日出生在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德时，他的父亲Sir Robert Drury46岁，母亲Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury40岁。他于1516年2月7日与Joan St Maur在英国英格兰结婚。他去世于1558年1月11日在英国素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲享年57岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可霍斯亞德。

nameMeanings.name: Drury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘light; beauty; prosperity’, also ‘rank, power, royal majesty’, a byname of the goddesses Lakshmi and Saraswati. Also widely used as an honorific title.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Drury was born on 30 May 1500, in Hawstead, Suffolk, England, his father, Sir Robert Drury, was 46 and his mother, Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury, was 40. He married Joan St Maur on 7 February 1516, in England, United Kingdom. He died on 11 January 1558, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Hawstead, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Drury est né le 30 mai 1500, à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Drury, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Joan St Maur le 7 février 1516, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1558, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Hawstead, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Drury am 30. Mai 1500 in Hawstead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Drury 46 und seine Mutter Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury 40. Er hat am 7. Februar 1516 in England, United Kingdom Joan St Maur geheiratet. Er starb am 11. Januar 1558 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England und wurde in Hawstead, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Drury è nato il il 30 maggio 1500 nel Hawstead, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Drury, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Joan St Maur il 7 febbraio 1516, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 11 gennaio 1558, nel Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Hawstead, Suffolk, England.

ko.St Marys Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffol: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈 스트 마이'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Drury(이)가 1500년 5월 30일 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Drury(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury(은)는 40세였다. 그는 1516년 2월 7일 영국 잉글랜드에서 Joan St Maur(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1558년 1월 11일 영국 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 호스테아드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Drury nasceu em 30 de maio de 1500, em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Drury, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan St Maur em 7 de fevereiro de 1516, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1558, em Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Hawstead, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.St Marys Church, Bury St Edmunds, Suffol: ст мэри'с чурч, бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Drury родился 30 мая 1500 г. в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Drury было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne of Burnham Thorpe, Norfolk Calthorpe Drury, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan St Maur 7 февраля 1516 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 11 января 1558 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности хавстид, суффолк, Англия.
